text: If you don't pay attention to me, I'll chew through your electrical cables. If you don't keep your eyes on me, I'll eat as many thumbtacks as I'm able To starve down my delicate throat if you even care.

If you don't keep your eyes on me, I'll eat as many thumbtacks as I'm able
To starve down my delicate throat if you even care.
